subject: docs(todo): add audit-cleanup verification + aggregate.js investigation
body:
Audit finding #17 follow-through. Three new entries added:

Post-sweep verification:
  2. Live browser verification of the audit-cleanup pass — tracks
     the SettingsPane fieldset/radio refactor, Progress.jsx semver
     doughnut h-45/h-50 utility, Header handleOpenFilters →
     OPEN_FILTER_SIDEBAR action.
  3. Live browser verification of the file-extraction refactors —
     TimingHeatmap, DebugTabs+debugStyles, discoverData, and
     useTimelineCharts. All four are pure code-organization splits
     that need spot-checking in a real browser.

Investigations:
  1. scripts/aggregate.js data flow — the script writes 5 JSON
     files into dashboard/ that no JS module imports. Either it's
     dead code (delete) or has an out-of-tree consumer (document).
     The entry includes investigation steps so the next session can
     resolve it definitively without re-doing the discovery work.

Footer "Last updated" rewritten to reflect the audit-cleanup
state — every audit finding addressed, every section component now
under the 500-line soft-limit, doc files trimmed.

Tags: documentation, todo, audit
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vanilla-daisyui-cleanup
Semver: patch
title: add audit-cleanup verification + aggregate.js investigation
